name: Extract text from a PDF file
description: PDF text extraction pipeline: searches Gmail for emails with PDF attachments, extracts attachment metadata, uses Claude AI to summarize the PDF information found, and posts a formatted summary to Slack with Block Kit.

source.originalName: Extract text from a PDF file

searchQuery.description: Gmail search query to find emails with PDFs (default: 'has:attachment filename:pdf')

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of emails to process (default: 5)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the summary

steps.name: Search Gmail for emails with PDF attachments
Extract message IDs from search results
Fetch full message details for each email
Extract PDF attachment info from email messages
